query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE leadType = 'PARTENARIAT') as total_leads_partenariat,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partner_candidates) as total_candidats,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l WHERE l.leadType = 'PARTENARIAT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM partner_candidates pc WHERE pc.metaLeadId = l.id)) as leads_sans_candidat,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l WHERE l.leadType = 'PARTENARIAT' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM partner_candidates pc WHERE pc.metaLeadId = l.id)) as leads_avec_candidat;
command:

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE leadType = 'PARTENARIAT') as total_leads_partenariat,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM partner_candidates) as total_candidats,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l WHERE l.leadType = 'PARTENARIAT' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM partner_candidates pc WHERE pc.metaLeadId = l.id)) as leads_sans_candidat,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads l WHERE l.leadType = 'PARTENARIAT' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM partner_candidates pc WHERE pc.metaLeadId = l.id)) as leads_avec_candidat;
